aws_sagemaker_model.name: Ensure Amazon SageMaker model uses network isolation

aws_sagemaker_notebook_instance.name: Ensure SageMaker notebook instance IAM policy is not overly permissive
Ensure that direct internet access is disabled for an Amazon SageMaker Notebook Instance
Ensure Sagemaker domain and notebook instance are encrypted by KMS using a customer managed Key (CMK)
Ensure SageMaker Notebook is encrypted at rest using KMS CMK
Ensure SageMaker notebook instances should be launched into a custom VPC
Ensure SageMaker Users should not have root access to SageMaker notebook instances
Ensure Amazon SageMaker Notebook Instance only allows for IMDSv2

aws_scheduler_schedule.name: Ensure EventBridge Scheduler Schedule uses Customer Managed Key (CMK)

aws_secretsmanager_secret.name: Ensure Secrets Manager secrets should have automatic rotation enabled
Ensure that Secrets Manager secret is encrypted using KMS CMK

aws_secretsmanager_secret_rotation.name: Ensure Secrets Manager secrets should be rotated within 90 days

aws_security_group.name: Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource
Ensure every security group and rule has a description
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 22
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 3389
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 80
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1
Ensure no security groups allow egress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1

aws_security_group_rule.name: Ensure every security group and rule has a description
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 22
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 3389
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 80
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1
Ensure no security groups allow egress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1

aws_ses_configuration_set.name: Ensure SES Configuration Set enforces TLS usage

aws_sns_topic.name: Ensure all data stored in the SNS topic is encrypted

aws_sns_topic_policy.name: Ensure SNS topic policy is not public by only allowing specific services or principals to access it
Ensure AWS SNS topic policies do not allow cross-account access

aws_sqs_queue.name: Ensure AWS SQS uses CMK not AWS default keys for encryption
Ensure SQS queue policy is not public by only allowing specific services or principals to access it
Ensure all data stored in the SQS queue is encrypted

aws_sqs_queue_policy.name: Ensure SQS queue policy is not public by only allowing specific services or principals to access it
Ensure SQS policy does not allow public access through wildcards
Ensure SQS policy does not allow ALL (*) actions.

aws_ssm_document.name: Ensure Session Manager data is encrypted in transit
Ensure SSM documents are not Public

aws_ssm_parameter.name: AWS SSM Parameter should be Encrypted
Ensure SSM parameters are using KMS CMK

aws_ssoadmin_managed_policy_attachment.name: Ensure AWS Managed IAMFullAccess IAM policy is not used.
Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy

aws_ssoadmin_permission_set_inline_polic.name: Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow full IAM privileges
Ensure IAM policies does not allow privilege escalation
Ensure IAM policies does not allow credentials exposure
Ensure IAM policies does not allow data exfiltration
Ensure IAM policies does not allow permissions management / resource exposure without constraints
Ensure IAM policies does not allow write access without constraints
Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions
Ensure IAM policies that allow full "*-*" administrative privileges are not created
Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions

aws_subnet.name: Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default

aws_timestreamwrite_database.name: Ensure that Timestream database is encrypted with KMS CMK

aws_transfer_server.name: Ensure Transfer Server is not exposed publicly.
Ensure Transfer Server allows only secure protocols
Ensure AWS Transfer Server uses latest Security Policy

aws_volume_attachment.name: Ensure that only encrypted EBS volumes are attached to EC2 instances

aws_vpc_endpoint_service.name: Ensure that VPC Endpoint Service is configured for Manual Acceptance

aws_vpc_security_group_egress_rule.name: Ensure every security group and rule has a description
Ensure no security groups allow egress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1

aws_vpc_security_group_ingress_rule.name: Ensure every security group and rule has a description
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 22
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 3389
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 80
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1

aws_waf_rule_group.name: Ensure WAF rule has any actions

aws_waf_web_acl.name: Ensure WAF rule has any actions

aws_wafregional_rule_group.name: Ensure WAF rule has any actions

aws_wafregional_web_acl.name: Ensure WAF rule has any actions

aws_wafv2_rule_group.name: Ensure WAF rule has any actions

aws_wafv2_web_acl.name: Ensure AWS ALB attached WAFv2 WebACL is configured with AMR for Log4j Vulnerability
Ensure AWS API Gateway Rest API attached WAFv2 WebACL is configured with AMR for Log4j Vulnerability
Ensure AWS AppSync attached WAFv2 WebACL is configured with AMR for Log4j Vulnerability
Ensure WAF prevents message lookup in Log4j2. See CVE-2021-44228 aka log4jshell
Ensure WAF rule has any actions

aws_workspaces_workspace.name: Ensure that Workspace user volumes are encrypted
Ensure that Workspace root volumes are encrypted

data.aws_iam_policy.name: Ensure AWS Managed IAMFullAccess IAM policy is not used.

data.aws_iam_policy_document.name: Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow full IAM privileges
